summary: Taught splitShellArgs to honor POSIX single-quoted grouping, not just double-quoted.
reason: MCP callers passing a value containing a space via single quotes (e.g. 'Bob's diner') saw their token silently split into multiple positional arguments. Closes Greptile finding #3 on PR #624.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/mcp/cobratree passes, including single-quote and mixed-quote regression coverage.
